violations.text: An allergy statement is need on the menu/ordering area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Food was disposed of. Proper glove use reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of bio-film and food debris respectively. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine turned off. Ice machine to be washed rinsed and sanitized prior to use. Multiple bags were brought in at the time of inspection. Deli slicer must be cleaned and sanitized prior to use. Proper cleaning procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Sliced deli meats/ prepared foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
Old rodent droppings were observed in the corners and behind equipment. Establishment to clean floors in facility. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of new droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floors in various locations in the facility has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the area above the 3-bay sink. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The ceiling in the corner above the deli slicer is in poor repair (open ceiling). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling shall be sealed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2024

Food contact surfaces of prep table were observed with an accumulation of rodent droppings. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC cleaned area at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of new rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the counter underneath the register have an accumulation of rodent droppings. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The floor behind tables/equipment has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the area above the 3-bay sink. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of the following were observed with an accumulation of debris: -The ice machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. -The slicer was observed with food debris. -Prep tables were observed with rodent droppings. PIC washed, rinsed, and sanitized table. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by accumulation of droppings throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving underneath the register and behind the prep unit have an accumulation of rodent droppings. The non-food contact surfaces of the back of the flip top on the prep unit was observed with an accumulation of old food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024

The floor in the kitchen area and along the wall leading to establishment next door has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
